title: Curios Trinkets Bridge
description: Automatically bridges Trinkets (Fabric) accessories to Curios (Forge) when using Sinytra Connector.
body: Curios Trinkets Bridge is a mod created to solve the accessory management confusion between Trinkets and Curios when using Sinytra Connector. It automatically converts Trinkets accessories into Curios-compatible accessories, allowing them to be equipped in Curios slots while still triggering their intended effects properly.
